landing.title: Book a Private Call With Me
landing.subtitle: Stuck on a problem, planning your next AI build, or want a focused mentor session? Pay for my time and let's solve it together — live, on Google Meet.

currentlyUnavailable.title: Booking is currently paused
currentlyUnavailable.description: I'm not opening new slots right now. Drop me a DM on socials — texts are always free.

freeText.title: DMs and questions are forever free
freeText.description: I believe information should be free. Send me a text on any of my socials and I will reply when I have time. Texts cost you nothing — they never will. What costs is my synchronous attention: when you book my calendar, I drop everything else for that hour and focus 100% on your problem. That's the part you pay for.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Description: An active subscription is required to access live calls.
howItWorks.step2Description: Choose a date, duration and slot from the live availability calendar.
howItWorks.step3Description: Stripe Checkout — pay exactly for the time you book, by the hour.
howItWorks.step4Description: I add a Google Meet link to your booking. You'll see it in your profile.

subscriptionRequired.title: Subscribe to unlock 1-on-1 calls
subscriptionRequired.description: Live mentorship is part of the subscriber-only perks.

booking.title: Schedule your call
booking.topicPlaceholder: What do you want to talk about? (e.g. "review my Next.js architecture", "plan my AI feature")
booking.notesPlaceholder: Anything I should prepare or look at beforehand?
booking.noSlots: No available slots for this date. Try another day.

errors.topic_required: Please describe the topic of the call.
errors.subscription_required: An active subscription is required to book a call.
errors.slot_taken: That slot was just booked. Please pick another.
errors.too_soon: That slot is too close to now. Pick a later time.
errors.too_far: That slot is too far in the future.
errors.day_disabled: That day of the week is not available.
errors.before_window: That time is before the daily start time.
errors.after_window: That time would extend beyond the daily end time.
errors.duration_not_aligned: Duration must be a multiple of {step} minutes.
errors.checkout_failed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.

myMeetings.title: My Meetings
myMeetings.subtitle: Your booked 1-on-1 calls and Google Meet links.

empty.title: No meetings yet
empty.description: Book a private call to get started.

card.linkPending: Meet link will appear here once added by host

list.title: Meetings
list.cancelConfirm: Cancel this meeting? The user will need a manual refund via Stripe.

settings.title: Meetings Settings
settings.description: Configure pricing, availability and booking constraints.

fields.enabledHint: Master switch. When off, the public page shows "currently unavailable".
fields.requiresActiveSubscriptionHint: Only paying subscribers can complete checkout.
fields.publicNoteHint: Shown on the booking page (e.g. "I usually reply within 24h").
fields.minLeadHint: Earliest a user can book from "now". e.g. 12 = no bookings within 12h.
fields.maxLeadHint: Latest a user can book ahead. e.g. 168 = 7 days.

checkout.successDescription: I'll add the Google Meet link shortly. You'll see it on your meetings page and receive an email.
checkout.cancelledDescription: No worries — your slot was released. Try again whenever you're ready.
